## 11. Open Issues & Warnings
### 🔴 CRITICAL
- **backup-108** — LXC 108 has no backup archive | Evidence: CTS array is CTS=(101 102 103 104 105 106 107 997)   # 102 re-included, all LXC app fleet + tailscale; 999 decommissioned | Impact: New/current LXC is outside backup coverage.
- **backup-109** — LXC 109 has no backup archive | Evidence: CTS array is CTS=(101 102 103 104 105 106 107 997)   # 102 re-included, all LXC app fleet + tailscale; 999 decommissioned | Impact: New/current LXC is outside backup coverage.
- **smart-sdg** — sdg SMART media errors | Evidence: {'device': '/dev/sdg', 'health': 'PASSED', 'reallocated': '32', 'pending': '8', 'offline_uncorrectable': '8', 'temperature': '51', 'crc': '7', 'command_timeout': '90196607308'} | Impact: Data-loss risk on mergerfs/NAS disk.

## 13. Improvement Loop
- Keep backup coverage derived from live `pct list` and archive files, not only the script arrays.
- Preserve the SMART trend and treat any non-zero pending/offline-uncorrectable sectors as critical.
- Continue tiered reachability handling: Docker-VM warning does not block LXC audit.
